summary.en: LED luminaires sold into US building, commercial, and workplace channels must satisfy the applicable legal and code requirements: OSHA workplace electrical-safety rules, adopted electrical/building codes, and Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) acceptance. UL 1598 is a voluntary ANSI/UL product-safety standard commonly used by OSHA-recognised NRTLs to evaluate luminaires and support listing; it is not itself a federal legal mandate and alternatives may be accepted where the legal/code requirement is otherwise satisfied. NRTL listing marks (e.g., UL, ETL/Intertek, CSA, TÜV) are commonly required by AHJs, retailers, procurement specifications, and OSHA-regulated workplaces.
summary.zh: 面向美国建筑、商业和工作场所渠道销售的LED灯具，必须满足适用的法律和规范要求：OSHA工作场所电气安全规则、已采纳的电气/建筑规范以及主管机关（AHJ）认可。UL 1598是OSHA认可NRTL常用来评估灯具并支持列名的自愿性ANSI/UL产品安全标准；它本身不是联邦强制法律要求，在能够以其他方式满足法律/规范要求时可采用替代技术路径。NRTL列名标志（如UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA、TÜV）通常由AHJ、零售商、采购规范和OSHA监管工作场所要求。
summary.zht: 面向美國建築、商業和工作場所渠道銷售的LED燈具，必須滿足適用的法律和規範要求：OSHA工作場所電氣安全規則、已採納的電氣/建築規範以及主管機關（AHJ）認可。UL 1598是OSHA認可NRTL常用來評估燈具並支持列名的自願性ANSI/UL產品安全標準；它本身不是聯邦強制法律要求，在能夠以其他方式滿足法律/規範要求時可採用替代技術路徑。NRTL列名標誌（如UL、ETL/Intertek、CSA、TÜV）通常由AHJ、零售商、採購規範和OSHA監管工作場所要求。

summary.en: In China, luminaire safety is governed by GB 7000.1-2015 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which is technically harmonised with IEC 60598-1:2014. Mandatory certification is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification, 3C) scheme administered by CNCA. A Chinese CCC certification to GB 7000.1 does not satisfy the US NRTL certification requirement; no mutual recognition agreement exists between CCC and the NRTL program.
summary.zh: 在中国，灯具安全由GB 7000.1-2015（灯具——第1部分：一般要求和试验）规范，该标准在技术上与IEC 60598-1:2014协调。强制认证通过由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的CCC（中国强制性认证，3C）制度执行。依据GB 7000.1取得的中国CCC认证不满足美国NRTL认证要求；CCC与NRTL项目之间不存在相互认可协议。
summary.zht: 在中國，燈具安全由GB 7000.1-2015（燈具——第1部分：一般要求和試驗）規範，該標準在技術上與IEC 60598-1:2014協調。強制認證通過由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的CCC（中國強制性認證，3C）制度執行。依據GB 7000.1取得的中國CCC認證不滿足美國NRTL認證要求；CCC與NRTL項目之間不存在相互認可協議。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1-2015 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/CNCA)

gap.en: Exporters should obtain evidence accepted by US AHJs, OSHA-regulated workplaces, retailers, and specifiers, commonly an NRTL listing using UL 1598 or another accepted safety standard. Chinese CCC test reports and certificates to GB 7000.1 are not accepted as equivalents. The NRTL process normally involves product samples, factory audits, follow-up inspection, and label authorisation. Key technical differences include US voltage/frequency, NEC wiring compatibility, and luminaire temperature marking conventions. Documentation gap: products need AHJ/OSHA-accepted listing evidence and NEC Article 410 installation markings where applicable.
gap.zh: 出口商应取得美国AHJ、OSHA监管工作场所、零售商和规格制定方可接受的证据，通常是依据UL 1598或其他可接受安全标准进行的NRTL列名。依据GB 7000.1取得的中国CCC测试报告和证书不被接受为等同凭证。NRTL流程通常包括产品样品、工厂审核、跟踪检查及标签授权。关键技术差异包括美国电压/频率、NEC接线兼容性及灯具温度标注规范。文件差距：产品在适用时需要AHJ/OSHA可接受的列名证据和NEC第410条安装标识。
gap.zht: 出口商應取得美國AHJ、OSHA監管工作場所、零售商和規格制定方可接受的證據，通常是依據UL 1598或其他可接受安全標準進行的NRTL列名。依據GB 7000.1取得的中國CCC測試報告和證書不被接受為等同憑證。NRTL流程通常包括產品樣品、工廠稽核、跟蹤檢查及標籤授權。關鍵技術差異包括美國電壓/頻率、NEC接線相容性及燈具溫度標注規範。文件差距：產品在適用時需要AHJ/OSHA可接受的列名證據和NEC第410條安裝標識。

target.en: Legal/code obligation applies through OSHA workplace rules, adopted NEC/building codes, and AHJ acceptance where applicable. UL 1598 is a voluntary NRTL evaluation standard that can support listing and acceptance; it is not the mandatory legal obligation or the sole permissible route.
target.zh: 法律/规范义务在适用时来自OSHA工作场所规则、已采纳的NEC/建筑规范和AHJ认可。UL 1598是可支持列名和认可的自愿性NRTL评估标准；它本身不是强制法律义务，也不是唯一允许路径。
target.zht: 法律/規範義務在適用時來自OSHA工作場所規則、已採納的NEC/建築規範和AHJ認可。UL 1598是可支持列名和認可的自願性NRTL評估標準；它本身不是強制法律義務，也不是唯一允許路徑。

cn.en: Mandatory — CCC certification required for luminaires under CNCA-C09-01 before sale in China
cn.zh: 强制——依据CNCA-C09-01，灯具在中国销售前须取得CCC认证
cn.zht: 強制——依據CNCA-C09-01，燈具在中國銷售前須取得CCC認證

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) — NRTL Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For US commercial, building, and workplace channels, LED luminaires generally need AHJ/OSHA/retailer-accepted safety listing evidence. UL 1598 is a voluntary standard commonly used by NRTLs to support that listing; it is not itself mandatory law. Chinese CCC certification to GB 7000.1 does not satisfy the US listing pathway. Exporters should plan for NRTL evaluation, factory follow-up inspection, NEC Article 410 markings, and authorised listing marks where the sales channel or AHJ requires them.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于美国商业、建筑和工作场所渠道，LED灯具通常需要AHJ/OSHA/零售商可接受的安全列名证据。UL 1598是NRTL常用来支持该列名的自愿性标准；它本身不是强制法律。依据GB 7000.1取得的中国CCC认证不满足美国列名路径。出口商应在销售渠道或AHJ要求时，规划NRTL评估、工厂跟踪检查、NEC第410条标识及授权列名标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於美國商業、建築和工作場所渠道，LED燈具通常需要AHJ/OSHA/零售商可接受的安全列名證據。UL 1598是NRTL常用來支持該列名的自願性標準；它本身不是強制法律。依據GB 7000.1取得的中國CCC認證不滿足美國列名路徑。出口商應在銷售渠道或AHJ要求時，規劃NRTL評估、工廠跟蹤檢查、NEC第410條標識及授權列名標誌。

requirement_topic.en: LED Driver / Power Supply Safety — UL 8750

summary.en: LED drivers and power supplies used in luminaires must satisfy applicable US electrical-safety and code expectations when the finished luminaire is placed in OSHA-regulated, building-code, AHJ, retailer, or procurement channels. UL 8750 is a voluntary ANSI/UL product-safety standard commonly used by NRTLs to evaluate LED equipment within a luminaire listing. It is not itself a federal legal mandate or the sole permissible standard. A separately listed driver is often the practical route, while integrated luminaires may be evaluated as a complete assembly.
summary.zh: 灯具中使用的LED驱动电源，在成品灯具进入OSHA监管、建筑规范、AHJ、零售商或采购渠道时，必须满足适用的美国电气安全和规范预期。UL 8750是NRTL在灯具列名中常用来评估LED设备的自愿性ANSI/UL产品安全标准；它本身不是联邦强制法律，也不是唯一允许标准。驱动器单独列名通常是实际采用的路径，集成型灯具也可作为完整组件进行评估。
summary.zht: 燈具中使用的LED驅動電源，在成品燈具進入OSHA監管、建築規範、AHJ、零售商或採購渠道時，必須滿足適用的美國電氣安全和規範預期。UL 8750是NRTL在燈具列名中常用來評估LED設備的自願性ANSI/UL產品安全標準；它本身不是聯邦強制法律，也不是唯一允許標準。驅動器單獨列名通常是實際採用的路徑，整合型燈具也可作為完整組件進行評估。

standards_or_laws: UL 8750 — Standard for Light Emitting Diode (LED) Equipment for Use in Lighting Products
UL 1598 — Standard for Luminaires (references UL 8750 for LED driver components)

summary.en: China addresses LED driver safety under GB 19510.1-2009 (Controlgear for lamps — Part 1: General and safety requirements) and the LED-specific GB 19510.14-2009 (Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules). These are administered under the CCC scheme. Chinese CCC test reports to GB 19510 are not accepted as equivalents to US NRTL UL 8750 certification.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 19510.1-2009（灯的控制装置——第1部分：一般要求和安全要求）及LED专用GB 19510.14-2009（LED模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）规范LED驱动电源安全，并在CCC制度下执行。依据GB 19510取得的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为美国NRTL UL 8750认证的等同凭证。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 19510.1-2009（燈的控制裝置——第1部分：一般要求和安全要求）及LED專用GB 19510.14-2009（LED模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）規範LED驅動電源安全，並在CCC制度下執行。依據GB 19510取得的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為美國NRTL UL 8750認證的等同憑證。

standards_or_laws: GB 19510.1-2009 — Controlgear for lamps — Part 1: General and safety requirements (SAC)
GB 19510.14-2009 — Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC)

gap.en: A separately NRTL-listed LED driver is often needed as practical evidence for a finished luminaire listing, but the legal/code obligation is the accepted safety of the complete product rather than mandatory use of UL 8750 by name. If the luminaire uses a third-party driver, exporters should verify that the driver has listing evidence accepted by the chosen NRTL or plan for component evaluation during the luminaire review. Chinese GB 19510 certificates do not transfer to the US NRTL pathway.
gap.zh: LED驱动器单独取得NRTL列名通常是成品灯具列名的实际证据，但法律/规范义务是完整产品的安全性获得认可，而不是强制按名称使用UL 8750。若灯具使用第三方驱动器，出口商应确认该驱动器具有所选NRTL可接受的列名证据，或规划在灯具评估中进行组件评估。中国GB 19510证书不能转用于美国NRTL路径。
gap.zht: LED驅動器單獨取得NRTL列名通常是成品燈具列名的實際證據，但法律/規範義務是完整產品的安全性獲得認可，而不是強制按名稱使用UL 8750。若燈具使用第三方驅動器，出口商應確認該驅動器具有所選NRTL可接受的列名證據，或規劃在燈具評估中進行組件評估。中國GB 19510證書不能轉用於美國NRTL路徑。

target.en: Legal/code obligation applies through the finished-product safety listing and AHJ/OSHA acceptance where applicable. UL 8750 is a voluntary NRTL evaluation standard for LED equipment; it is not mandatory law or the only acceptable compliance route.
target.zh: 法律/规范义务在适用时来自成品安全列名以及AHJ/OSHA认可。UL 8750是LED设备的自愿性NRTL评估标准；它不是强制法律，也不是唯一可接受合规路径。
target.zht: 法律/規範義務在適用時來自成品安全列名以及AHJ/OSHA認可。UL 8750是LED設備的自願性NRTL評估標準；它不是強制法律，也不是唯一可接受合規路徑。

cn.en: Mandatory — LED drivers subject to CCC certification under GB 19510 series before sale in China
cn.zh: 强制——LED驱动器在中国销售前须依据GB 19510系列取得CCC认证
cn.zht: 強制——LED驅動器在中國銷售前須依據GB 19510系列取得CCC認證

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) — NRTL Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED drivers should be supported by listing or component-evaluation evidence accepted by the NRTL evaluating the finished luminaire. UL 8750 is a voluntary standard commonly used for that evaluation, not mandatory law. Chinese GB 19510 certification does not substitute for US NRTL evidence. An integrated luminaire evaluation may address driver and luminaire safety together.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED驱动器应具备评估成品灯具的NRTL可接受的列名或组件评估证据。UL 8750是该评估常用的自愿性标准，不是强制法律。中国GB 19510认证不能替代美国NRTL证据。集成型灯具评估可同时处理驱动器和灯具安全。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED驅動器應具備評估成品燈具的NRTL可接受的列名或組件評估證據。UL 8750是該評估常用的自願性標準，不是強制法律。中國GB 19510認證不能替代美國NRTL證據。整合型燈具評估可同時處理驅動器和燈具安全。

requirement_topic.en: NRTL Certification Program — No Mutual Recognition with CCC
requirement_topic.zh: NRTL认证项目——与CCC无相互认可
requirement_topic.zht: NRTL認證項目——與CCC無相互認可

summary.en: The US NRTL (Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory) program, administered by OSHA under 29 CFR 1910.399, requires that electrical equipment used in workplaces be listed or labelled by an OSHA-recognised NRTL. For LED luminaires, NRTL certification involves product testing at an accredited laboratory, a factory inspection program (initial and follow-up audits), and the right to apply the NRTL certification mark. OSHA-recognised NRTLs include UL, Intertek (ETL), CSA Group, TÜV SÜD, MET Laboratories, and others.
summary.zh: 美国NRTL（全国认可测试实验室）项目由OSHA依据29 CFR 1910.399管理，要求工作场所使用的电气设备须由OSHA认可的NRTL列名或加贴标签。对于LED灯具，NRTL认证包括在经认可实验室进行的产品测试、工厂检查计划（初始及跟踪审核）以及贴附NRTL认证标志的权利。OSHA认可的NRTL包括UL、Intertek（ETL）、CSA集团、TÜV SÜD、MET实验室等。
summary.zht: 美國NRTL（全國認可測試實驗室）項目由OSHA依據29 CFR 1910.399管理，要求工作場所使用的電氣設備須由OSHA認可的NRTL列名或加貼標籤。對於LED燈具，NRTL認證包括在經認可實驗室進行的產品測試、工廠檢查計畫（初始及跟蹤稽核）以及貼附NRTL認證標誌的權利。OSHA認可的NRTL包括UL、Intertek（ETL）、CSA集團、TÜV SÜD、MET實驗室等。

standards_or_laws: 29 CFR 1910.303(b)(2) — OSHA general industry electrical equipment listing requirement

summary.en: China's mandatory product certification system (CCC, China Compulsory Certification) for luminaires is administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) through CNCA-designated certification bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre). The CCC scheme and the US NRTL program have no mutual recognition agreement. A product holding CCC certification and a product holding NRTL certification have each demonstrated conformity to their respective national standards, but neither recognition transfers to the other market.
summary.zh: 中国灯具强制性产品认证（CCC，中国强制认证）制度由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）通过CQC（中国质量认证中心）等CNCA指定认证机构管理。CCC制度与美国NRTL项目之间不存在相互认可协议。持有CCC认证的产品和持有NRTL认证的产品均已分别证明符合各自的国家标准，但两者的认可均不相互转让。
summary.zht: 中國燈具強制性產品認證（CCC，中國強制認證）制度由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）通過CQC（中國質量認證中心）等CNCA指定認證機構管理。CCC制度與美國NRTL項目之間不存在相互認可協議。持有CCC認證的產品和持有NRTL認證的產品均已分別證明符合各自的國家標準，但兩者的認可均不相互轉讓。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C09-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA)
GB 7000.1-2015 — Luminaires Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC)

gap.en: There is no mutual recognition between CCC and the US NRTL program. Exporters should plan for evaluation and factory inspection under an OSHA-recognised NRTL when the product is intended for OSHA-regulated workplaces, AHJ-controlled building installations, retailer specifications, or other channels that demand listed electrical equipment. The evaluation commonly uses UL 1598 and UL 8750, but those named standards are voluntary NRTL routes rather than mandatory federal law. Lead time is typically 8-20 weeks depending on the NRTL and product complexity.
gap.zh: CCC与美国NRTL项目之间不存在相互认可。当产品用于OSHA监管工作场所、AHJ管辖的建筑安装、零售商规格或其他要求列名电气设备的渠道时，出口商应规划由OSHA认可NRTL进行评估和工厂检查。评估通常采用UL 1598和UL 8750，但这些具名标准是自愿性NRTL路径，而不是联邦强制法律。根据NRTL及产品复杂程度，周期通常为8至20周。
gap.zht: CCC與美國NRTL項目之間不存在相互認可。當產品用於OSHA監管工作場所、AHJ管轄的建築安裝、零售商規格或其他要求列名電氣設備的渠道時，出口商應規劃由OSHA認可NRTL進行評估和工廠檢查。評估通常採用UL 1598和UL 8750，但這些具名標準是自願性NRTL路徑，而不是聯邦強制法律。根據NRTL及產品複雜程度，週期通常為8至20週。

target.en: Mandatory legal/code acceptance may apply through OSHA workplace rules, adopted NEC/building codes, AHJ decisions, and procurement or retailer specifications. NRTL certification is the common evidence route; UL 1598 and UL 8750 are voluntary evaluation standards used within that route, not mandatory law or sole permissible standards.
target.zh: 强制性法律/规范认可可来自OSHA工作场所规则、已采纳的NEC/建筑规范、AHJ决定以及采购或零售商规格。NRTL认证是常见证据路径；UL 1598和UL 8750是该路径中使用的自愿性评估标准，不是强制法律或唯一允许标准。
target.zht: 強制性法律/規範認可可來自OSHA工作場所規則、已採納的NEC/建築規範、AHJ決定以及採購或零售商規格。NRTL認證是常見證據路徑；UL 1598和UL 8750是該路徑中使用的自願性評估標準，不是強制法律或唯一允許標準。

cn.en: Mandatory — CCC certification required before luminaires can be sold in China; no substitution by NRTL certification
cn.zh: 强制——灯具在中国销售前须取得CCC认证；NRTL认证不可替代
cn.zht: 強制——燈具在中國銷售前須取得CCC認證；NRTL認證不可替代

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) — NRTL Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No mutual recognition exists between China CCC and the US NRTL program. LED luminaire exporters should budget for NRTL evaluation, factory inspections, and label authorisation where OSHA, AHJ, NEC adoption, retailer, or procurement channels demand listed equipment. UL 1598 and UL 8750 are common voluntary evaluation standards, not mandatory law. Existing CCC status does not transfer to the US listing pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC与美国NRTL项目之间不存在相互认可。当OSHA、AHJ、NEC采纳、零售商或采购渠道要求列名设备时，LED灯具出口商应将NRTL评估、工厂检查及标签授权纳入预算。UL 1598和UL 8750是常用自愿性评估标准，不是强制法律。现有CCC状态不能转用于美国列名路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC與美國NRTL項目之間不存在相互認可。當OSHA、AHJ、NEC採納、零售商或採購渠道要求列名設備時，LED燈具出口商應將NRTL評估、工廠檢查及標籤授權納入預算。UL 1598和UL 8750是常用自願性評估標準，不是強制法律。現有CCC狀態不能轉用於美國列名路徑。
